question: What is CloudSync?
answer: CloudSync is a cloud storage and backup service that automatically syncs your files across all your devices and keeps encrypted backups so you never lose your data.

question: How much does CloudSync cost?
answer: CloudSync offers a free plan with 5GB of storage. Paid plans start at $4.99/month for 100GB and go up to $19.99/month for 2TB of storage.

question: Is there a free trial for paid plans?
answer: Yes, all paid plans come with a 14-day free trial. No credit card is required to start the trial.

question: How do I cancel my subscription?
answer: You can cancel anytime from Account Settings > Billing > Cancel Subscription. Your plan will remain active until the end of the current billing period.

question: Can I get a refund?
answer: We offer a 30-day money-back guarantee on all annual plans. Monthly plans are non-refundable but you can cancel at any time to stop future charges.

question: What payment methods do you accept?
answer: We accept all major credit cards, PayPal, and Apple Pay. Annual plans can also be paid via bank transfer for business accounts.

question: How do I reset my password?
answer: Click 'Forgot Password' on the login screen, enter your email, and we'll send you a secure link to reset your password. The link expires after 30 minutes.

question: How do I change my email address?
answer: Go to Account Settings > Profile > Email Address, enter your new email, and confirm it via the verification link we send you.

question: Is my data encrypted?
answer: Yes, all files are encrypted both in transit (TLS 1.3) and at rest (AES-256). Only you hold the keys to decrypt your files.

question: Is CloudSync GDPR compliant?
answer: Yes, CloudSync is fully GDPR compliant. We store data in EU data centers for EU customers and provide tools to export or delete your data at any time.

question: Which devices are supported?
answer: CloudSync works on Windows, macOS, Linux, iOS, and Android. We also offer browser access from any modern web browser.

question: How do I install CloudSync on my computer?
answer: Download the installer from cloudsync.com/download, run it, and sign in with your account. The app will start syncing your selected folders automatically.

question: Can I share files with people who don't have CloudSync?
answer: Yes, you can generate a shareable link for any file or folder. Recipients can view or download it in their browser without needing a CloudSync account.

question: Is there a limit on file size?
answer: Free accounts can upload files up to 2GB each. Paid accounts can upload files up to 50GB each.

question: How do I recover a deleted file?
answer: Deleted files are kept in the Trash for 30 days. Go to Trash, select the file, and click Restore to recover it.

question: Can I sync only specific folders?
answer: Yes, open the CloudSync app, go to Preferences > Selective Sync, and choose exactly which folders you want synced to this device.

question: Does CloudSync work offline?
answer: Yes, files marked as 'Available Offline' are stored locally and will sync automatically once you reconnect to the internet.

question: How do I upgrade my storage plan?
answer: Go to Account Settings > Billing > Change Plan, select the plan you want, and confirm. The upgrade takes effect immediately.

question: How do I contact customer support?
answer: You can reach our support team via live chat in the app, or by emailing support@cloudsync.com. We typically respond within 24 hours.

question: Do you offer team or business accounts?
answer: Yes, CloudSync for Teams starts at $9.99/user/month and includes admin controls, shared team folders, and centralized billing.

question: How do I invite team members?
answer: In a Team account, go to Admin Console > Members > Invite, enter their email addresses, and they'll receive an invitation to join your workspace.

question: What happens to my files if I downgrade my plan?
answer: If your usage exceeds your new plan's storage limit, your account becomes read-only until you either remove files or upgrade again. No files are deleted automatically.

question: Can I use two-factor authentication?
answer: Yes, enable 2FA in Account Settings > Security using an authenticator app like Google Authenticator or Authy for an extra layer of protection.

question: How do I delete my account permanently?
answer: Go to Account Settings > Privacy > Delete Account. This permanently removes all your files and data after a 14-day grace period.

question: Does CloudSync have version history?
answer: Yes, we keep up to 30 previous versions of each file for the last 180 days, so you can restore an earlier version at any time.
